---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026 - Getting Started with Geoscientific Machine Learning"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Hands-on Workshop]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# Getting Started with Geoscientific Machine Learning

[Dr. Pankaj K Mishra, Sanni Laaksonen, and Eetu Hyypio · AIEPS Workshop 2026]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[Day 1]{} [June 1, 2026]{} [Hands-on exercises]{} [1 hr 50 min]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Back to Programme](../2026.qmd#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
[Workshop Website](https://geo-sciml.com/){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body .session-detail}

## Overview

This beginner-friendly workshop introduces geoscientific machine learning using Julia and is designed for participants with no programming background.

**Duration:** 1 hour 50 minutes

Participants will set up the basics, train their first neural network, and get practical guidance on how to continue learning machine learning for geoscience after the session.

## Workshop Description

Machine learning is becoming central to modern geoscience workflows, but getting started can feel overwhelming for newcomers. This session offers a practical entry point with a gentle, hands-on introduction to Julia programming and core ML concepts.

By the end of the workshop, participants will have trained a first neural network and will leave with clear next steps, tools, and learning resources to continue building ML skills for geoscientific applications.

## Instructor Bio

- [Dr. Pankaj K Mishra](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pankajkmishra01/) - AIEPS organiser and invited speaker.
- [Sanni Laaksonen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanni-laaksonen-4a679419b/) - Co-instructor.
- Eetu Hyypio - Co-instructor.

## Materials and Instructions

- Workshop site: <https://geo-sciml.com/>
- Slides: To be added.
- Notebooks or scripts: To be added.
- Preparation notes: Designed for no prior programming experience.

:::
